audit.priceRangeSummary: TTS API: $4.20/M chars. Voice Agent API: $0.05/min. LLM pricing varies by Grok model.
audit.limitsSummary: TTS max 15,000 chars/request. Voice Agent max 30 min/session, 100 concurrent sessions/team.
audit.regionSummary: Voice Agent docs point to us-east-1 and region-specific endpoint format <region>.api.x.ai; generic global endpoint api.x.ai also documented.
audit.freeTierSummary: No clear permanent free tier documented.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Public standalone STT endpoint was not verified. Treat xAI as LLM+TTS unless you use the bundled Voice Agent flow.

supplementalResearch.title: 9. xAI (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✗
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 9. xAI (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✗

**Status:** Active. TTS launched **March 16, 2026** (Beta).

**LLM models:**

| Model ID | Input $/1M | Output $/1M | Context |
|---|---|---|---|
| `grok-4.20-reasoning` | TBD | TBD | **2,000,000** |
| `grok-4-1-fast-reasoning` | **$0.20** | **$0.50** | 2,000,000 |
| `grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning` | $0.20 | $0.50 | 2,000,000 |
| `grok-4` | $3.00 | $15.00 | 256,000 |
| `grok-3` | $3.00 | $15.00 | 131,072 |
| `grok-3-mini` | $0.30 | $0.50 | 131,072 |

Automatic prompt caching: ~75% discount. Batch API: 50% off.

**TTS (Beta, launched March 16, 2026):**

| Voice ID | Type | Tone |
|---|---|---|
| `eve` | Female | Energetic, upbeat (default) |
| `ara` | Female | Warm, friendly |
| `rex` | Male | Confident, professional |
| `sal` | Neutral | Smooth, balanced |
| `leo` | Male | Authoritative |

Pricing: **$4.20/1M characters**. REST: `POST https://api.x.ai/v1/tts` (max 15,000 chars). WebSocket: `wss://api.x.ai/v1/tts` (unlimited, multi-utterance sessions). **20 languages** (en, ar-EG, ar-SA, ar-AE, bn, zh, fr, de, hi, id, it, ja, ko, pt-BR, pt-PT, ru, es-MX, es-ES, tr, vi). Codecs: mp3, wav, pcm, mulaw, alaw. Expressive tags: `[laugh]`, `[sigh]`, `<whisper>`, `<soft>`, `<singing>`, etc.

**Voice Agent API:** `wss://api.x.ai/v1/realtime` — **$0.05/min** ($3.00/hr), bidirectional speech-to-speech, 100 concurrent sessions, 30-min max session.

**STT:** Not yet available as standalone. Teased as "coming weeks." Voice Agent has built-in STT.

**Free tier:** **$25 signup credits** + **$150/month** via data sharing program (opt-in). Total potential: **$175/month free**.

**Datacenters:** us-east-1 (US), eu-west-1 (Europe). SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA eligible, GDPR compliant.

**Integration notes:** **OpenAI-compatible API**. REST + gRPC + WebSocket. Minimal code changes from OpenAI.

---
